title: Cori's Improved Villagers
description: Keeps the iconic look of villagers while improving on the model, as well as adds so much more!
body:
_[​OPTIFINE OR EMF REQUIRED]_

Keeps the iconic look of villagers while improving on the model, as well as adds so much more!

**Villagers:**
- Changed nose and head to be smaller
- 30 different Skintones for 13 biomes!
- 27 new Outfits: Some outfit variation for used village biomes, and added outfits for unused biomes
- Including the oddities _(Mushroom, Nether, Deep Dark, End)_

**Illagers:**
- Changed nose and head to be smaller
- More Skintones _(lighter and darker grays)_

**Iron Golems:**
- Biome Variations _(Desert has no vines, snowy has ice on it, etc)_

**Items/Blocks:**
- Changed Totem of Undying to better match the changed villagers 
- Changed "Friend" to better match the changed villagers
